description: Security invariants that must never regress

test_cases.name: register_omits_private_key
test_cases.assertion: POST /api/v1/agents/register body must not contain 'BEGIN PRIVATE KEY'

test_cases.name: register_is_unauthenticated
test_cases.assertion: POST /api/v1/agents/register must not have Authorization header

test_cases.name: fallback_does_not_activate
test_cases.assertion: If JACS is loaded but signing fails, SDK propagates error (does not fall back to local crypto)

test_cases.name: malformed_agent_id_escaped
test_cases.assertion: Agent ID with special chars is URL-escaped in all API paths

test_cases.name: encrypted_key_requires_password
test_cases.assertion: Loading encrypted private key without password returns clear error
